hero.title: Privacy
hero.headline: Privacy Policy
hero.description: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: CareNet is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you use our platform.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, phone number, email address, and role (Guardian, Caregiver, Agency, or Shop Owner). We also collect information automatically, such as device information, IP address, and usage data.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, facilitate transactions, communicate with you, ensure platform security, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.title: Data Security & Encryption
sections.content: All data transmitted between the CareNet app and our servers is encrypted using industry-standard protocols. We implement robust security measures including encryption, row-level security, multi-factor authentication, and regular security audits to protect your data.

sections.title: User Data Deletion Instructions
sections.content:
**How to request deletion of your account and data:**

If you wish to delete your account and all associated personal data from CareNet, please follow these steps:

1. Send an email to: admin@carenet.digital-papyrus.xyz
2. Include your registered email address and phone number
3. Specify "Account Deletion Request" in the subject line

Our team will verify your identity, process your request, and permanently delete your account and all associated personal data within 30 days. You will receive a confirmation email once the deletion is complete.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: We share your information only when necessary for service delivery, with your consent, or as required by law. Caregiver information is shared with agencies and guardians for placement purposes only.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt out of marketing communications and manage your privacy settings through your account.

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve user experience, analyze usage patterns, and provide personalized content. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.content: We may use third-party services for payment processing, analytics, and communication. These services have their own privacy policies and data handling practices.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our services are not intended for children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.

sections.title: International Data Transfers
sections.content: Your data is primarily stored in Bangladesh. We may transfer data internationally for service delivery, ensuring appropriate safeguards are in place.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or by email.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at carenet@digital-papyrus.xyz
